items.title: Coaching with Dane
items.description: Inclusive coaching for riders of all abilities. Welcoming, supportive and 100% focused on having fun on the bike.

items.title: Gate Night
items.description: Open practice on the Pro Gate. All AUS Cycling members welcome — any club, any track. Canteen open.

items.title: Coaching with Connor
items.description: Structured coaching across three skill streams. Mini-wheelers, beginners and intermediates ride before the gates open.

items.title: Thursday Coaching with Bodi
items.description: Coaching with Olympian Bodi Turner. Coaching for all ages from Beginner to Advanced

items.title: Eastfield vs Lilydale Round 1
items.description: Round 1 of the Eastfield vs Lilydale Series
